summary: Backend-only testing of P0 fixes: Cart API, Service Whispers, Auth, Pet Personalization. All 19 tests passed (100% success rate). Cart endpoints work correctly, services have mira_whisper field, authentication returns token, and pet personalization returns user's pets when authenticated.
critical_code_review_comments: cart_routes.py - Well-structured with GET/POST/DELETE endpoints, proper session/user_id handling
service_box_routes.py - Services correctly return mira_whisper field, 695 total services with 100% whisper coverage
auth_routes.py - Login returns proper JWT token with user data including membership tier
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 backend fixes verified working: Cart API (GET/POST/DELETE), Service whispers (100% coverage), Auth (login returns token), Pet personalization (returns Max - Golden Retriever for test user). 695 services in database, 693 active.

features_tested.auth_login: PASS - Returns token, user data (Test User, free tier)
features_tested.auth_get_current_user: PASS - Returns user info with token
features_tested.authenticated_cart_flow: PASS - Full flow with user_id works

cart_endpoints.GET /api/cart: Working - returns cart with items array

pet_endpoints.GET /api/pets/my-pets: Working - returns user's pets when authenticated
